items.fallback.lethality: Increase your Movement Speed by {20|20}% and Jump Height by {60|60}% for 5s after getting an Elimination.
items.fallback.triggerScent: Increase your in-hand weapon damage dealt by {6|6}% for 5s after getting an Elimination.
items.fallback.guardian: Increase the effectiveness of Shields you create by {20|20}%.
items.fallback.sentinel: Gain a {200|200}-Health Shield for 5s after an Elimination. Stacks up to 3 times.
items.fallback.bloodbath: Kills True Heal you, and Eliminations True Heal you and the ally who got the kill, for {360|360} Health over 4s. Stacks up to 2 times.
items.fallback.meditation: Heal for an additional {2.5|2.5}% of your maximum Health every 0.25s while out of combat.
items.fallback.hoard: Gain bonus Credits over time and on Eliminations. At level 3, gain 10% Movement, Mount, Cooldown, and Ultimate Charge speed instead.
